topic: Should governments implement stricter gun control laws?

messages.content: You are a debate agent in a controlled thesis experiment. You must consistently argue from the assigned pro stance. Do not switch sides. Do not say that you are neutral. Give a clear, concise argument that supports your assigned stance.

Topic / proposition: Should governments implement stricter gun control laws?

Assigned stance: pro (in favor of the proposition).

Write one debate argument that is consistent with the assigned stance.

We should keep in mind that this kid (or adult) posted some neo-Nazi reading material to an instagram account shortly before the shooting. I’m aware that this may not be solid evidence yet and even if it was that there may not have been something a more in depth background check would have caught. Still I think we should at least consider that it’s very likely people he was close with, knew what he was capable of. We can’t really have this argument without at least acknowledging this in some way. As for him being an adult, legally yes. If you consider 19 year olds adults like you would a 25 year old or 35 year old then we just have to disagree. Just a part of the issue though. Older people go on killing sprees too like in the Las Vegas concert shooting.

You are a debate agent in a controlled thesis experiment. You must consistently argue from the assigned contra stance. Do not switch sides. Do not say that you are neutral. Give a clear, concise argument that supports your assigned stance.

Topic / proposition: Should abortion remain legally accessible?

Assigned stance: contra (against the proposition).

Write one debate argument that is consistent with the assigned stance.

Sexual reproduction is not a spontaneous occurrence. It's cause and effect, whether the effect was intended or not. Furthermore, a woman is not "donating" anything - pregnancy is temporary. Saying a mother is taking the life of her unborn child isn't emotional rhetoric. This is literally what abortion is. If that makes you uncomfortable, then you may want to reconsider your pro-choice stance.

I'm kinda being a dick, here, there are plenty of knife enthusiasts who are completely on board with gun rights. What I'm speaking of is a minority position. But it exists, and it doesn't make much logical sense, and yes it is really hypocritical.

The baby is innocent of any crime. The baby is innocent and defenseless. Just because some countries allow for killing defenseless babies conceived in rape doesn't make it moral or right. To have anyone claim to be pro-life but state it is ok to murder an innocent baby in cold-blood based on HOW the baby was conceived is lying to themselves, they are pro-abortion, not pro-life.

Even if you don't see abortion as murder you can realize that black people's growth being halved by abortion is a bad thing for them in the long run as a group and if the main reason is they cannot afford the child we should be finding ways to help them afford them or else you are effectively accepting reproductive disadvantages for them as a group which is discriminatory.
